name: python3-simplekv
title: python3-simplekv
summary: simple key-value store for binary data (Python 3)
description:
simple key-value store for binary data (Python 3)
This package contains an API for very basic key-value stores used for small,
frequently accessed data or large binary blobs. Its basic interface is easy to
implement and it supports a number of backends, including the filesystem,
SQLAlchemy, MongoDB, Redis and Amazon S3/Google Storage.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-simplekv because simple key-value store for binary data (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-simplekv as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-simplekv with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-simplekv --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
